channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch Australian Grand Prix 2026 F1: free stream, preview, schedule
item.description: All the ways to watch Australian Grand Prix 2026 live streams online and from anywhere, as F1's new season introduces the biggest regulation shake-up in years.

item.title: Here’s Every Country Directly Impacted by the War on Iran
item.description: As the conflict in the Middle East continues to escalate, more than a dozen countries in the region have reportedly been affected by strikes.

item.title: This solar-powered laptop that you can dunk in a pool has something surprising that no rivals can offer
item.description: The Oukitel RG14-P combines rugged durability, solar charging, hot swappable batteries, and integrated lighting for demanding industrial field environments.

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: Iran War in the AI Era, Prediction Market Ethics, and Paramount Beats Netflix
item.description: In this episode, our hosts unpack the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, particularly as the AI industry has been entrenching itself with the Department of Defense.

item.title: ‘One Piece’ Straw Hat Pirates, Ranked
item.description: Not all nakama are created equal, so here's our ranking of our favorite Straw Hats from least to most favorite.

item.title: OpenAI Had Banned Military Use. The Pentagon Tested Its Models Through Microsoft Anyway
item.description: Sources allege the Defense Department experimented with Microsoft’s version of OpenAI technology before the ChatGPT-maker lifted its prohibition on military applications.

item.title: 'Affordable' it is not — Nagra's music streamer and DAC costs thousands, but you know you want it anyway
item.description: Nagra's Compact Player might have you thinking about CD transports, but it's much more into the hi-res streaming game

item.title: Kevin O’Leary says Gen Z sends this ‘horrific signal’ to employers
item.description: The ‘Shark Tank’ star said in a recent interview that doing this during an interview is a huge no-no. Don’t bring your mom or dad to an interview with Shark Tank investor Kevin O’Leary if you were planning on it.

item.title: Sam Altman Says ‘Government Should Be More Powerful Than Corporations.’ Which Government?
item.description: Being an international software giant with singular loyalty to Donald Trump is an impossible mission.

item.title: AWS launches a new AI agent platform specifically for healthcare
item.description: AWS is launching Amazon Connect Health, an AI agent platform that will help with patient scheduling, documentation, and patient verification.

item.title: COPPA 2.0 passes the Senate again, unanimously this time
item.description: Today the US Senate unanimously passed proposed legislation known as COPPA 2.0. This measure, fully named the Children and Teens’ Online Privacy Protection Act, aims to create new protections for younger users online, such as blocking platforms from collecting their personal data without consent. COPPA 2.0 is a modernized take on the Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act of 1998, attempting to address recent changes in common online activities, like targeted advertising, that could prove harmful to minors. Lawmakers have made several attempts to get this bipartisan bill through. While it ha...

item.title: Study Finds Surprising Trend Among Ozempic Users Taking Fewer Doses Than Usual
item.description: The findings suggest that tapering could help GLP-1 users reduce their medical bills while maintaining their weight loss.

item.title: Roku’s solution to streaming decision fatigue is a trivia game
item.description: Roku users who struggle to figure out what they want to watch might have an answer in the form of "Roklue," a new game coming to the streaming platform on March 7th. Announced on Thursday, Roklue is a pop culture trivia game that Roku says helps users discover new content and "tests players on the […]

item.title: FBI investigating hack on its wiretap and surveillance systems: Report
item.description: Hackers allegedly broke into the FBI’s networks, according to a report by CNN.

item.title: A Solar Superstorm Blasted Mars—and Its Atmosphere Freaked Out
item.description: A new study investigated how the biggest solar storm in more than two decades impacted the Red Planet.

item.title: Your 401(k) could shrink due to climate risks. A lawsuit argues that your employer has a duty to protect it
item.description: A novel legal challenge alleges that a real estate company breached its duties by failing to protect retirement savings from climate-related financial risks. Climate change comes with serious financial risks, and those risks could affect your retirement account. Is it up to your employer, then, to protect your 401(k) from those concerns?

item.title: US reportedly considering sweeping new chip export controls
item.description: In an alleged drafted proposal, the U.S. government would play a role in every chip export sale regardless of which country it's coming from.

item.title: Netflix Taps Ben Affleck to Help Get More Filmmakers to Use AI
item.description: The video streaming company announced that is buying Ben Affleck's AI tech company InterPositive.

item.title: Amazon.com is experiencing issues and failing to load prices
item.description: Amazon's website appears to be experiencing technical issues that are keeping users from logging in and preventing prices from displaying correctly. DownDetector reported a spike of outage reports around 2PM ET, and the issues seem to have grown from there.While Amazon.com seems to be able to display the company’s homepage, prices and product information aren't loading, and clicking through to product pages in some cases shows an error page, with text that says "Sorry, something went wrong on our end." Users have also reported being unable to log into their accounts. “We're sorry that some cus...

item.title: ByteDance’s AI Ambitions Are Being Hampered by Compute Restraints and Copyright Concerns
item.description: ByteDance’s new Seedance 2.0 AI video model seemed unstoppable—until heavy demand strained the company’s compute capacity and copyright complaints began piling up.

item.title: Mike Flanagan’s ‘Exorcist’ Absorbs Mike Flanagan’s List of Favorite Actors
item.description: Lots of familiar faces from Flanagan's Netflix horror era will join Scarlett Johansson in his new take on the spooky classic.

item.title: Microsoft confirme Project Helix : la prochaine Xbox fera tourner les jeux PC
item.description: L'ère Phil Spencer est terminée, mais Microsoft ne perd pas de temps. Asha Sharma, la nouvelle patronne de Xbox, vient de confirmer le Project Helix.

item.title: Scientists Claim They’ve Finally Made the Elusive ‘Hexagonal’ Diamond
item.description: After decades of chasing after a rare hexagonal diamond, a Chinese team says their iteration of the elusive material is the most important yet.

item.title: Lenovo adopts Lego mindset with a modular ThinkBook AI PC, but will it be yet another underwhelming Motorola Ara-esque venture?
item.description: Lenovo introduces a modular ThinkBook AI PC concept anchored in enterprise durability, lifecycle value, and system-level AI integration.

item.title: Pokopia made me look at Pokémon’s high-tech future in a whole new way
item.description: Pokémon Pokopia features, of all things, a 3D printer. I wasn't sure why this surprised me so much, given all the other high-tech gear in pretty much every Pokémon game. But I was not expecting to find, inside the once-crumbling Pokémon Center I'd just worked hard to restore, a kind of machine I'd never seen […]

item.title: This CEO explains what’s really behind layoffs—and it’s not AI
item.description: Companies have repeatedly blamed AI for layoffs over the past year. Now, not even CEOs are buying it anymore. Last week, Block CEO Jack Dorsey shared that his fintech company would be cutting 40% of its workforce, arguing that AI would allow them to do more with smaller teams. Many observers wondered if the large-scale layoffs reflected the new reality amid rapid AI adoption, and whether it was just a matter of time before other companies followed suit. ...

item.title: Trump fires Homeland Security Secretary Noem over mounting criticism of her immigration enforcement
item.description: Trump said he’ll make Noem a ‘Special Envoy for The Shield of the Americas.’ President Donald Trump on Thursday fired his embattled Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, after mounting criticism over her leadership of the department, including the handling of the administration’s immigration crackdown and disaster response.

item.title: How to watch F1 live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The best dating apps for serious relationships
item.description: The best dating apps for people looking for a long-term relationship.

item.title: 'The ultimate do-it-all shoe' If you're not wearing Saucony Ride 19 running shoes in 2026, you're missing out
item.description: I ran 50k in the Saucony Ride 19 and they're my new, go-to daily trainer.

item.title: Smart businesses don’t adapt to crony capitalism
item.description: They work together to contain it before it spreads. On February 27, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth took the unprecedented step of designating a U.S. firm—Anthropic—as a supply chain risk. Anthropic’s crime? It refused to violate industry-wide protocols against using AI for mass surveillance or autonomous weapons.

item.title: It’s Peak Season for Bird-Watchers to Spot Migratory Hummingbirds, and Our Favorite Feeder Is on Sale
item.description: Early March is the best time to see rare migratory species in your own backyard, and a smart feeder can help you ID them.

item.title: Xbox CEO confirms next-gen 'Project Helix' console will play PC games
item.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma is gearing up to spill the beans on Microsoft’s next-generation console. In a post on X today, she revealed that the system is codenamed “Project Helix.” Confirming previous rumors, she says it will “lead in performance” and play both console and PC games. Sharma also notes that she’ll be discussing the system at GDC next week with partners and developers. The next-gen console tease follows Sharma’s appointment as Xbox CEO a few weeks ago, after former Xbox head Phil Spencer stepped down. Last year, it was clear that things were rocky for Microsoft’s storied gaming brand, ...

item.title: Amazon is rolling out a redesigned Fire TV app
item.description: With the updated Fire TV app, users can browse and discover content directly from their phone, manage their watchlist on the go, and play titles on their TV from the mobile app.

item.title: What Eli Lilly’s new employer platform could mean for access to weight-loss drugs
item.description: Lilly Employer Connect aims to make obesity treatments more predictable for employers while lowering costs for workers seeking Zepbound. Eli Lilly wants to get its obesity drugs into the hands of more Americans and it’s betting on employers to help do so.

item.title: How to watch Ireland vs. Wales in the 2026 Six Nations online for free
item.description: Watch the Six Nations for free. Live stream Ireland vs. Wales in the 2026 Six Nations for free from anywhere in the world.
